items.title: Breach Chain Timeline
items.description: A time-anchored credential incident chain from rotation to leak and remediation.
items.prompt: Build a verified world timeline for this incident chain.

items.title: Secret State Conflict
items.description: Conflicting claims around whether a production secret was env-only or present in source.
items.prompt: Produce a deterministic casefile focused on contradictions and unknowns.

items.title: Policy Control Mismatch
items.description: Control statements conflict with observed access and handling behavior.
items.prompt: Build a world model that highlights policy violations and open questions.
